title: Buttery Crispy Saudi Arabian Pul Biber Flatbread
description: A crispy and flavorful flatbread from Saudi Arabia, perfect as a post-workout snack, featuring the spicy and smoky pul biber pepper, and suitable for a vegan diet. This buttery treat is both satisfying and healthy.

ingredients.name: pul biber pepper
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1-2 tsp pul biber flakes

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, pul biber pepper, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Gradually add the warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let it rest in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the melted vegan butter on each flatbread.
Cook the flatbreads for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Brush with olive oil and serve warm.
